# Café Delight

> Locally-owned coffee shop in Parker, Colorado serving espresso, signature lattes, boba, matcha, gelato, and italian sodas. Order online with secure card payment, pick up in ~5 minutes.

## Location
- 9395 Crown Crest Blvd, Parker, CO 80138
- Phone: (720) 201-7193

## Hours
- Monday – Friday: 7 AM – 3 PM (Mountain Time)
- Saturday & Sunday: closed

## What we serve
- **Espresso drinks:** Espresso Shot, Americano, Cortado, Latte, Breve Latte, Honey Latte
- **Signature Lattes:** Pumpkin Spice, Chocolate Mocha, White Mocha, Raspberry White Mocha, Caramel Macchiato, Shaken Espresso, Tiramisu Latte, Spanish Latte
- **Coffee:** Drip Coffee, Nitro Brew, Nitro w/ Cold Foam
- **Tea & Matcha:** Chai Tea Latte, Matcha Tea Latte, Hot Tea, London Fog, Matcha Chai, Strawberry Matcha, Raspberry Matcha
- **Boba (all $6):** Caramel Macchiato, White Mocha, Shaken Espresso, Spanish Latte, Pumpkin Spice, Honey Chai, Matcha Tea
- **Italian Sodas:** Passionfruit, Strawberry, Raspberry, w/ Cream, Red Bull
- **Gelato & Affogato**

## Customization
- Milk substitutions (+$0.50): oat, almond, soy, coconut
- Flavor shots (+$0.50): vanilla, caramel, hazelnut, almond, irish cream, pistachio, coconut, salted caramel, peppermint, lavender, raspberry, tiramisu, pumpkin spice

## How to order online
1. Visit https://cafedelightco.com
2. Browse the menu, pick a drink, customize size and add-ons
3. Check out — pay with card, Apple Pay, Google Pay, or Samsung Pay
4. Walk in within ~5 minutes — your name is on the order

## Payment
- All major credit/debit cards
- Apple Pay, Google Pay, Samsung Pay
- Payment processed securely by Clover (PCI-compliant hosted checkout)
- Cash accepted in-store only

- [Menu](https://cafedelightco.com/menu)

- [FAQ](https://cafedelightco.com/faq)
- [Terms of Service](https://cafedelightco.com/legal/terms)
- [Privacy Policy](https://cafedelightco.com/legal/privacy)
